category_title: Students who exhibit task avoidance through vocalizations and floor-dropping behaviors
minimal_context: The student and instructor are walking down the hallway to practice travel skills using a long cane.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to practice hallway travel with your long cane. Let's start walking.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks halfway down the hall while being partially held and physically prompted)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Agrees to walk independently and takes a few steps without being held)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Drops to the ground again, begins screaming and crying, and refuses to stand or move)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to practice hallway travel with your long cane. Let's start walking.

STUDENT: (Walks halfway down the hall while being partially held and physically prompted)

TUTOR: Now try walking by yourself.

STUDENT: (Agrees to walk independently and takes a few steps without being held)

TUTOR: Keep going down the hall.

STUDENT: (Drops to the ground again, begins screaming and crying, and refuses to stand or move)

task.content: Hallway travel with the long cane

context.social_setting: One-on-one with instructor, partially holding the child and physically prompting him to walk

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: After walking halfway down the hall while partially holding the child and physically prompting him to walk
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The child agrees to walk independently, but soon drops to the ground again, refusing to move.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: May be acting out in order to receive the reinforcer after he recovers from his behavior

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to participate in walking activities during an O&M lesson
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: The child screamed, cried, dropped to the floor, and refused to stand or walk.
